zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk FitzWarin II於1146年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓時，他的父親Fulk FitzWarin I31歲，母親Eva de Whittington and Alveston38歲。他於大約1160年與Hawise de Dinan在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1197年11月6日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾奧斯維斯崔享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fulk FitzWarin II于1146年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓时，他的父亲Fulk FitzWarin I31岁，母亲Eva de Whittington and Alveston38岁。他于大约1160年与Hawise de Dinan在英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1197年11月6日在英国英格兰史洛普爾奧斯維斯崔享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk FitzWarin II was born in 1146, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Fulk FitzWarin I, was 31 and his mother, Eva de Whittington and Alveston, was 38. He married Hawise de Dinan about 1160, in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 November 1197, in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulk FitzWarin II est né en 1146, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Fulk FitzWarin I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eva de Whittington and Alveston, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de Dinan environ 1160, à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1197, à Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fulk FitzWarin II 1146 in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fulk FitzWarin I 31 und seine Mutter Eva de Whittington and Alveston 38. Er hat um 1160 in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Hawise de Dinan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. November 1197 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk FitzWarin II è nato il nel 1146 nel Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Fulk FitzWarin I, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Eva de Whittington and Alveston, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Hawise de Dinan circa 1160, nel Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 novembre 1197, nel Oswestry, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Fulk FitzWarin IIが1146年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンで生まれた時，父Fulk FitzWarin Iは31歳，母Eva de Whittington and Alvestonは38歳であった。約1160年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンでHawise de Dinanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1197年11月6日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアオスウエストリーで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fulk FitzWarin II(이)가 1146년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulk FitzWarin I(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva de Whittington and Alveston(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에서 Hawise de Dinan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1197년 11월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 오스베스트리에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk FitzWarin II nasceu em 1146, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Fulk FitzWarin I, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Eva de Whittington and Alveston, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise de Dinan aproximadamente 1160, em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1197, em Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk FitzWarin II родился в 1146 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Fulk FitzWarin I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eva de Whittington and Alveston, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Dinan около 1160 г. в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 ноября 1197 г. в местности освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fulk FitzWarin II nació en 1146, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Fulk FitzWarin I, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Eva de Whittington and Alveston, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Hawise de Dinan aproximadamente 1160, en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1197, en Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
